subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! How can I ever remember Thee or call upon Thee, when all my circumstances, my powers, my elements and my senses confess their impotence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی کیف اذکرک و ادعوک و جمیع شئونى و قوائى و ارکانى و حواسی تعترف بعجزی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @praise and encouragement
